title: Getting Started with DisForm: Your First Discord Form in 5 Minutes
description: New to DisForm? This guide walks you through creating your first form, adding questions, setting up Discord webhook delivery, and collecting responses. All in under five minutes.

title: Why Discord-Native Forms Beat Google Forms Every Time
description: Google Forms works, but if your audience is on Discord you are making your life harder than it needs to be. Here is why embedding forms into your workflow beats external survey tools.

title: Tips for Creating Forms People Actually Want to Fill Out
description: A well designed form gets more responses and better quality answers. Here are the practical tips and patterns that make your Discord forms actually work.
